summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarvbhasa multilingual AI platform. Backend APIs working with real Sarvam integration. Frontend fully functional with tricolor theme, Hindi tagline, and all navigation features.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Real Sarvam translate API integration (Hello -> नमस्कार)
Real Sarvam chat API integration (Hello -> नमस्ते, आप कैसे हैं?)
Auth endpoints returning correct 401 for unauthenticated requests
Landing page loads with tricolor CTA and Hindi tagline (भाषा बदले, मतलब नहीं.)
2-second loading animation transitions to main app
Sidebar shows all required menu items (Home, New Chat, Chat, Text to Text Translate, Speech to Text, Upgrade to Premium, Sign In with Google)
Sidebar toggle collapses/expands correctly
Chat page loads with language selectors and real API integration
Chat functionality works with real translated responses
Text Translate page loads with all elements (source/target text areas, swap, copy, speak buttons)
Translation functionality works with real Sarvam API
Swap button functionality works
Speech to Text page loads with mic button and language selector
Upgrade page loads with upgrade button
Home page loads with feature cards
Back button returns to landing page
Language-specific background images display on chat page
Tricolor accent bar present
Copy and speak buttons present on translate page
Google Sign In button present (redirect-based auth)
